([Estonian](/wiki/Estonian_language "Estonian language") for *"Old Town"*) is a subdistrict ([Estonian](/wiki/Estonian_language "Estonian language"): *asum*) in the district of [Kesklinn](/wiki/Kesklinn,_Tallinn "Kesklinn, Tallinn") (Midtown), [Tallinn](/wiki/Tallinn "Tallinn"), the capital of [Estonia](/wiki/Estonia "Estonia"). It has a population of 4,939 (As of 2022[[update]](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Vanalinn&action=edit)).[[1]](#cite_note-population-1)
["Statistical Yearbook of Tallinn 2022"](https://www.tallinn.ee/et/media/509253). Tallinn City Government. p. 25. Retrieved 12 July 2023.

**Vanalinn** ([Estonian](/wiki/Estonian_language "Estonian language") for *"Old Town"*) is a subdistrict ([Estonian](/wiki/Estonian_language "Estonian language"): *asum*) in the district of [Kesklinn](/wiki/Kesklinn,_Tallinn "Kesklinn, Tallinn") (Midtown), [Tallinn](/wiki/Tallinn "Tallinn"), the capital of [Estonia](/wiki/Estonia "Estonia"). It has a population of 4,939 (As of 2022[[update]](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Vanalinn&action=edit)).[[1]](#cite_note-population-1)

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/4/4a/Commons-logo.svg/40px-Commons-logo.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Commons-logo.svg)

Wikimedia Commons has media related to [Vanalinn](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Category:Vanalinn "commons:Category:Vanalinn").
